history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands next to a custom black motorcycle at night. They are wearing a black leather jacket with white trim, black pants, black gloves with white lettering that says "HARLEY RACING", and a black helmet with white decals. The helmet has a retro, full-face design with a prominent chin guard. The motorcycle is a cafe racer style, with a sleek black frame and a visible engine. The background features a paved area, a decorative metal gate with ornate scrollwork, and a building with some foliage. The lighting is dim, suggesting it's nighttime, with a streetlight or ambient light casting shadows and highlighting the textures of the leather and metal. The overall color palette is dominated by black, with accents of white and the muted tones of the pavement and building. The mood is cool, stylish, and perhaps a bit rebellious, evoking a sense of urban motorcycle culture.
